action.reasoning: Observation: Merged checkpoint saved at merged_ckpt (7.1GB) and predict.py supports loading from a dir with config.json. Need to validate locally then submit. Analysis: Quick local sanity check that predict.py works with merged_ckpt before submitting eval. Decision: Run a quick predict on val (limit 5) using merged_ckpt to confirm it works.
